name: KIDZ AI Inc.
business: The company operates through its wholly-owned subsidiary Class Over Inc. and provides comprehensive online interactive live courses for K-12 students in the United States and around the globe. Its curriculum covers a wide variety of subjects, including interest-oriented classes and test preparation courses for various exams and competitions.
sellsTo: K-12 students in the United States and globally
Parents seeking after-school enrichment and tutoring
Students preparing for academic competitions and exams

exposures.sentence: We continue to invest in and develop our AI capabilities to enhance the adaptability and responsiveness of our platform.
In December 2025, we launched an AI robotics initiative aimed at integrating physical robotic systems into our educational platform.
The Company has adopted a digital asset treasury strategy that includes exposure to blockchain-based assets such as Solana.

catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we launched an AI robotics initiative aimed at integrating physical robotic systems into our educational platform.
On June 6, 2025, the Company consummated the initial sale of $11 million of Notes pursuant to the Note Purchase Agreement.

tamClaims.claim: The global online tutoring market was valued at approximately $10.42 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 14.5% from 2025 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a Grand View Research report, the global online tutoring market, which was valued at approximately $10.42 billion in 2024, is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.5% from 2025 to 2030, fueled by a critical need for supplemental education.
